title: RSLZVA1 Socket Equipped with LED and Protection Circuit (Harmony Electromechanical Relays)
expected_content_elements: Environmental / standards information (pollution degree, impulse voltage)
key_details: Socket RSLZVA1 for Harmony RSL plug-in relays with 1 C/O contact and 12–24 V AC/DC coil.
Thermal current rating ~6 A and specified switching voltages.
Physical dimensions (width ~6.2 mm, height ~78.6 mm, etc.) and mounting style (screw terminal).
layout_features: Two-column spec table style (parameter on the left, value on the right).
Section headings like Main, Complementary, Environment.
Pages with diagrams and small captions.
images_and_diagrams_description: Contains technical line drawings: dimensional outline of socket and pin layout, wiring/connection diagrams, and mounting examples.
tables_description: Specification content is laid out as structured parameter–value tables (though visually may appear as aligned text).
extraction_checklist: Are all spec names and values mapped correctly (e.g., no value shifted to wrong parameter)?
Are measurement units preserved (V AC/DC, A, mm, kV)?
Are section titles and groupings (Main vs Complementary vs Environment) preserved?
Are connection diagrams at least detected with their captions or titles?
Is multilingual content (if present) separated cleanly instead of interleaved?
